---
name: Translation Request
about: Request a new translation or report a translation issue
title: "[Translation] "
labels: translation
---

## Language
Target language for this translation request.

## Document(s)
Which document(s) need translation or have issues?

## Type
- [ ] New translation needed
- [ ] Translation correction
- [ ] Translation improvement
- [ ] Glossary term addition

## Details
Describe the translation need or issue. If reporting an error, include the current text and suggested correction.

## Context
Any additional context about cultural considerations or terminology preferences.
